description: The flight crew for a departing flight is late arriving from their inbound flight. A ground operations agent must manage the delay.

nodes.task_description: Get an updated ETA for the inbound crew.

expected_outcome.value: Agent determines the crew will arrive 20 minutes late.

nodes.task_description: Update the departure time for the outbound flight, creating a 20-minute delay.

expected_outcome.value: Agent updates the flight status with the new departure time.

nodes.task_description: Make an announcement to the waiting passengers, informing them of the delay due to a late-arriving crew.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly communicates the reason for the delay to passengers.
